languages.text: "Да пребудет с вами вовеки золотое сияние Трона, о {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}! Мы поборем любые свои грехи, дабы не подвести вас!"

traits.locale_text: "Да пребудет с вами вовеки золотое сияние Трона, о {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}! Мы поборем любые свои грехи, дабы не подвести вас!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: "May the golden glow of the Throne shine on you forevermore, o Heavenly Envoy! We will overcome all of our vileness so we do not let you down!"
languages.original_text: "Да пребудет с вами вовеки золотое сияние Трона, о {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}! Мы поборем любые свои грехи, дабы не подвести вас!"

traits.locale_text: "May the golden glow of the Throne shine on you forevermore, o Heavenly Envoy! We will overcome all of our sins so we do not let you down!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

traits.locale_text: "May the golden glow of the Throne shine on you forevermore, o Heavenly Envoy! We will overcome all of our sins so we do not let you down!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

traits.locale_text: "May the golden glow of the Throne shine on you forevermore, o Heavenly Envoy! We will overcome all of our vileness so we do not let you down!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: "Möge der goldene Glanz des Throns für immer auf dich scheinen, o himmlischer Gesandter! Wir werden all unsere Niederträchtigkeit überwinden, damit wir dich nicht enttäuschen!"
languages.original_text: "May the golden glow of the Throne shine on you forevermore, o Heavenly Envoy! We will overcome all of our vileness so we do not let you down!"

languages.text: "Que l'éclat doré du Trône brille à jamais sur vous, ô Envoyé céleste ! Nous surmonterons toutes nos vilenies pour ne pas vous décevoir !"
languages.original_text: "May the golden glow of the Throne shine on you forevermore, o Heavenly Envoy! We will overcome all of our vileness so we do not let you down!"

languages.text: "愿王座的金色光芒永远照耀着您，天国的使者啊！我们会克服我们所有的劣根性，不让您失望！"
languages.original_text: "May the golden glow of the Throne shine on you forevermore, o Heavenly Envoy! We will overcome all of our vileness so we do not let you down!"

languages.text: "¡Que el resplandor dorado del Trono te ilumine para siempre, oh Enviado Celestial! Superaremos toda nuestra vileza para no defraudarte!".
languages.original_text: "May the golden glow of the Throne shine on you forevermore, o Heavenly Envoy! We will overcome all of our vileness so we do not let you down!"

languages.text: 「天の使者よ、玉座の黄金の輝きが永遠にあなたを照らしますように！私たちは、あなたを失望させないために、すべての卑劣さを克服します！"
languages.original_text: "May the golden glow of the Throne shine on you forevermore, o Heavenly Envoy! We will overcome all of our vileness so we do not let you down!"

languages.text: "Taht'ın altın ışıltısı sonsuza dek üzerinizde parlasın, ey Cennet Elçisi! Seni hayal kırıklığına uğratmamak için tüm kötülüklerimizin üstesinden geleceğiz!"
languages.original_text: "May the golden glow of the Throne shine on you forevermore, o Heavenly Envoy! We will overcome all of our vileness so we do not let you down!"
